w:r.w:t: This is to certify that the “Community Engagement Project” report
the partial fulfillment of the Term-work of Second year in Information Technology of Savitribai Phule Pune
at Pune Vidyarthi Griha’s College of Engineering, Technology & Management, Pune under Savitribai Phule, Pune University, Pune. This work is done during Semester I, Academic Year 2025-26.
A problem statement is a clear description of the
It includes a vision, issue statement, and method used to solve the
Problem statement should deal with identifying the problem, Beginning the statement with ideal situation, describing current gaps, Stating the consequences of the problem and
Objectives are concrete statements describing what the project is trying to
lower-level statements that describe the specific, tangible products and deliverables that the project will deliver.
The objective should be written at a lower level, so that it can be evaluated at the conclusion of a project to see whether it was achieved or not.
A well-worded objective will be Specific, Measurable, Attainable/Achievable, Realistic
its flow and work process. We can make use of any software architecture to represent the software we are proposed to develop.
Students are expected to brief the entire system with the help of Feature/Module name and
its Description to understand the features provided by system.
Community Engagement Snapshot / Photograph’s: Include the Photographs of
Community Engagement Student can create collage photo of multiple meetings. Students can provide any other engagement proofs with the community.
of the code to its specification can be easily verified.
Students can add GUI Snaps, Module Code snippet , Database snippets
State what you have learned (Design /Technology /Community Engagement/ Social )
from the project as outcome of project after completion of activity
